name: Asana
description: Asana is a work management platform that helps teams organize, track, and manage projects and tasks. Connect to Asana to create, update, and search tasks across your workspace with full project management capabilities.

capabilities.name: list_tasks
capabilities.description: List all tasks in a workspace, optionally filtered by project.

capabilities.name: create_task
capabilities.description: Create a new task in the workspace with title and optional details.

capabilities.name: update_task
capabilities.description: Update an existing task's properties like status, assignee, or due date.

capabilities.name: list_projects
capabilities.description: List all projects in the workspace.

capabilities.name: create_project
capabilities.description: Create a new project in the workspace.

capabilities.name: search_tasks
capabilities.description: Search for tasks in a specific workspace using filters and keywords.

capabilities.name: add_comment
capabilities.description: Add a comment or story to an existing task for collaboration.
